---
title: "Teaching"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
---

<style>

.section-cmd {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.72rem;
color: #aaa;
letter-spacing: 0.08em;
margin: 2.5rem 0 0;
padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e4e4;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 6px;
}
.section-cmd .ps { color: #16a34a; }

/* single-column list for awards/workshops */
.t-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }

.t-item {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 72px 1fr;
gap: 0 1.25rem;
padding: 6px 0;
border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
align-items: baseline;
}
.t-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0; }

.t-year {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.68rem;
color: #888;
letter-spacing: 0.03em;
white-space: nowrap;
padding-top: 1px;
line-height: 1.5;
}

.t-body {
font-size: 0.84rem;
font-weight: 300;
color: #333;
line-height: 1.5;
display: flex;
align-items: baseline;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 0 0.4rem;
}

.t-body a {
color: #111;
text-decoration: underline;
text-decoration-color: #e0e0e0;
text-underline-offset: 2px;
}
.t-body a:hover { color: #16a34a; text-decoration-color: #16a34a; }

.t-sep {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.67rem;
color: #ccc;
}

.t-sub {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.67rem;
color: #888;
}

.t-yrs {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.67rem;
color: #aaa;
}

.t-role {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.62rem;
color: #aaa;
border: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
padding: 1px 5px;
border-radius: 2px;
letter-spacing: 0.03em;
white-space: nowrap;
}

.t-link {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.65rem;
letter-spacing: 0.04em;
padding: 1px 8px;
border-radius: 2px;
text-decoration: none !important;
transition: all 0.12s;
background: #111;
color: #fff !important;
white-space: nowrap;
}
.t-link:hover {
background: #16a34a !important;
color: #fff !important;
text-decoration: none !important;
}

/* two-column grid for courses */
.t-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
}

.t-cell {
padding: 6px 0;
border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
padding-right: 1.5rem;
}

.t-cell:nth-child(even) {
padding-right: 0;
padding-left: 1.5rem;
border-left: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
}

.t-cell-title {
font-size: 0.84rem;
font-weight: 300;
color: #333;
line-height: 1.4;
}

.t-cell-sub {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.65rem;
color: #888;
margin-top: 1px;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 0 0.35rem;
}

.t-cell-yrs {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.65rem;
color: #aaa;
}

@media (max-width: 680px) {
.t-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.t-cell:nth-child(even) {
padding-left: 0;
border-left: none;
}
}

</style>

I began teaching in a Philadelphia summer credit-recovery program after undergrad and later spent two years as a middle school math teacher in New Haven, CT through Teach For America. During that time, I served as 8th Grade Chair and consulted on math curriculum for Achievement First. I love teaching and enjoy making quantitative and computational ideas accessible to a wide range of students.

I am fortunate to have been recognized with several teaching awards by the Harvard Kennedy School. While not confirmed, I believe I also hold the record for most courses taught as a teaching fellow at Harvard Kennedy School. 

---

<div class="section-cmd"><span class="ps">$</span> cat awards.log</div>

<div class="t-list">
<div class="t-item">
<div class="t-year">2025</div>
<div class="t-body"><a href="./Data/Distinction Award 2025.pdf" target="_blank">Distinction in Student Teaching</a><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-sub">Harvard Kennedy School</span></div>
</div>
<div class="t-item">
<div class="t-year">2024</div>
<div class="t-body"><a href="https://www.hks.harvard.edu/more/about/leadership-administration/academic-deans-office/slate/research-and-innovation/making/teaching#recipients" target="_blank">Dean's Award for Excellence in Student Teaching</a><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-sub">Harvard Kennedy School</span></div>
</div>
<div class="t-item">
<div class="t-year">2024</div>
<div class="t-body"><a href="./Data/Distinction Award 2024.pdf" target="_blank">Distinction in Student Teaching</a><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-sub">Harvard Kennedy School</span></div>
</div>
<div class="t-item">
<div class="t-year">2024</div>
<div class="t-body"><a href="https://chds.hsph.harvard.edu/chds-welcomes-new-educational-innovation-scholar/" target="_blank">Educational Innovation Scholar</a><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-sub">Center for Health Decision Science, Harvard</span></div>
</div>
</div>



<div class="section-cmd"><span class="ps">$</span> ls instructor-of-record/</div>

<div class="t-grid">

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Economics for Public Policy</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">Harvard Kennedy School, PPIA Junior Summer Institute</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2024 · 2025</span><span class="t-role">instructor</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Math Camp for Incoming PhD Students</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">Harvard Kennedy School</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2023 · 2024 · 2025</span><span class="t-role">instructor</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Data, Quantitative Methods, and Applications in Health Services Research</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">UChicago · Center for Translational Science</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2021 · 2022 · 2023</span><span class="t-role">co-instructor</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Coding Lab for Public Policy</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">UChicago · Harris School of Public Policy</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2021</span><span class="t-role">instructor</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">7th/8th Grade Mathematics</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">Teach For America · Amistad Academy, New Haven CT</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2018 · 2019 · 2020</span><span class="t-role">teacher</span></div>
</div>

</div>



<div class="section-cmd"><span class="ps">$</span> ls teaching-fellow/</div>

<div class="t-grid">

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Decision Science for Public Health</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2023 · 2024 · 2025 · 2026</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Big Data and Machine Learning</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">Harvard Kennedy School</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2023 · 2024 · 2025 · 2026</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Resources, Incentives, and Choices I</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">Harvard Kennedy School</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2022 · 2023 · 2024 · 2025</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Game Theory</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">Harvard Kennedy School</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2023 · 2024 · 2026</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Data and Programming for Policymakers</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">Harvard Kennedy School</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2023</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Machine Learning for Public Policy</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">UChicago · Computer Science</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2022</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Mathematics for Data Analysis and CS</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">UChicago · Computer Science</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2022</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Introductory Finance</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">UChicago · Booth School of Business</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2020 · 2021 · 2022</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Data Analysis in R and Python</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">UChicago · Booth School of Business</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2021</span></div>
</div>

<div class="t-cell">
<div class="t-cell-title">Introduction to Health Services Research</div>
<div class="t-cell-sub"><span class="t-sub">UChicago · Center for Translational Science</span><span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-cell-yrs">2021</span></div>
</div>

</div>


<div class="section-cmd"><span class="ps">$</span> ls workshops/</div>

<div class="t-list">
<div class="t-item">
<div class="t-year">2024</div>
<div class="t-body">An Introduction to Reproducible Programming and Project Management<span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-sub">Society for Medical Decision Making · Annual Meeting</span></div>
</div>
<div class="t-item">
<div class="t-year">2023</div>
<div class="t-body">Transparent Programming: Important Habits for Reproducibility and Research Integrity<span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-sub">Society for Medical Decision Making · Annual Meeting</span></div>
</div>
</div>


<div class="section-cmd"><span class="ps">$</span> ls open-materials/</div>

<div class="t-list">
<div class="t-item">
<div class="t-year">R</div>
<div class="t-body">Introduction to R<span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-sub">9-module course for policy students new to programming</span>&nbsp;<a href="./R files/Intro R.html" class="t-link">view</a></div>
</div>
<div class="t-item">
<div class="t-year">git</div>
<div class="t-body">Introduction to Git &amp; GitHub<span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-sub">Version control for researchers and students</span>&nbsp;<a href="./git files/Intro Git.html" class="t-link">view</a></div>
</div>
<div class="t-item">
<div class="t-year">ML</div>
<div class="t-body">API 222 Section Materials<span class="t-sep">·</span><span class="t-sub">Machine learning section materials</span>&nbsp;<a href="./api 222 files/API222.html" class="t-link">view</a></div>
</div>
</div>
